name: stream-deck-solarman
description: Solarman battery status plugin for Elgato Stream Deck

scripts.pack: npm run build && npm run build && streamdeck pack com.tbprojects.solarman.sdPlugin --force
scripts.restart: osascript -e 'quit app "Elgato Stream Deck"' ; sleep 2 ; open -a "Elgato Stream Deck"
